summary: Attacks against this unit deal +1 damage per stack. −1 stack at end of turn.
Movement costs are doubled. −1 stack at end of turn.
1 damage at start of turn; spreads to adjacent units. −1 stack at end of turn if no adjacent Blazing.
Restore HP equal to stacks at end of turn.
Cannot move. −1 stack at end of turn.
May fly over terrain without provoke for up to stacks of movement. −1 stack at end of turn.
Actions count one tier higher (Aux→Support→Main→blocked). −1 stack at end of turn.
Cannot inflict effects on others. −1 stack at end of turn.
Triggers when stacks reach 0. −1 stack at end of round.
Tile effect: hazard remains on the square.
